description: FeedClaw is a publishing-control service for AI agents that lets users draft, approve, schedule, and publish content to X and email. It is positioned as an approval inbox and delivery layer between AI assistants and outbound publishing channels.
summary: FeedClaw exposes an OAuth-protected MCP server at `https://www.feedclaw.io/api/chatgpt-app` and appears to offer a general REST API for agents, authenticated with FeedClaw OAuth.
